X^24 - X^23*Y + 720*X^23 + 23*X^22*Y + 179952*X^22 - 161*X^21*Y + 17282016*X^21 + 441081120*X^20 + 
    3864*X^19*Y + 5678198784*X^19 - 5681*X^18*Y + 45492865088*X^18 - 46644*X^17*Y + 252605710080*X^17
    + 53084*X^16*Y + 1038071734272*X^16 + 393024*X^15*Y + 3294356631552*X^15 + 19136*X^14*Y + 
    8309302456320*X^14 - 1978368*X^13*Y + 16991995871232*X^13 - 2689666*X^12*Y + 28563290271744*X^12 
    + 2882544*X^11*Y + 39839110889472*X^11 + 11625488*X^10*Y + 46370418130944*X^10 + 11002464*X^9*Y +
    45154515419136*X^9 - 3833824*X^8*Y + 36762400456704*X^8 - 19783680*X^7*Y + 24919460020224*X^7 - 
    21906304*X^6*Y + 13946021740544*X^6 - 11787776*X^5*Y + 6353857806336*X^5 - 1554432*X^4*Y + 
    2304837156864*X^4 + 2213888*X^3*Y + 642483486720*X^3 + 1648640*X^2*Y + 129654325248*X^2 + 
    516096*X*Y + 16911433728*X + Y^2 + 65536*Y + 1073741824
